---
title: "Research"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="vera-page vera-research-page">
  <section class="vera-section vera-section--page">
    <div class="vera-container">
      <div class="vera-pillars">

        <div class="vera-card">
          <div class="vera-card-title">Distributed Optimization</div>
          <p class="vera-card-desc">Stochastic, zeroth-order, and nonstationary optimization methods for distributed and networked systems.</p>
          <div class="vera-kw">SPSA · tracking · uncertainty · learning</div>
        </div>

        <div class="vera-card">
          <div class="vera-card-title">Multi-Agent Systems</div>
          <p class="vera-card-desc">Consensus, coordination, and graph-based interaction when no single agent observes the global objective.</p>
          <div class="vera-kw">consensus · graphs · distributed learning</div>
        </div>

        <div class="vera-card">
          <div class="vera-card-title">Networked Control</div>
          <p class="vera-card-desc">Control of interconnected dynamical systems under communication constraints and asynchrony.</p>
          <div class="vera-kw">stability · delays · logical time</div>
        </div>

        <div class="vera-card">
          <div class="vera-card-title">Robotic Teams</div>
          <p class="vera-card-desc">Distributed decision-making and coordination for multi-robot systems operating in shared environments.</p>
          <div class="vera-kw">formation · task allocation · autonomy</div>
        </div>

        <div class="vera-card">
          <div class="vera-card-title">Cyber-Physical Systems</div>
          <p class="vera-card-desc">Learning and control at the interface of computation, communication, and physical dynamics.</p>
          <div class="vera-kw">embedded · real-time · safety</div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <p class="vera-section-intro vera-cross-cutting">
        Cross-cutting themes: communication constraints · noisy measurements · delayed feedback ·
        nonstationarity · graph-structured interaction
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
